properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes, I feel The weight of the world on my shoulders At night, I hear The lies telling me, that I′m worthless, But I know you cover me And your grace, is all I need

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm gonna shout, Like the battle is over I′m gonna sing, Like the storm has passed I'll raise my hands, In the joy of surrender Cause it's already done, You′ve already won In you, I overcome

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You′re love, revives The purpose of all, that is broken You heal, my wounds And say to me child, you are chosen, chosen You never failed, In this hope, I will prevail

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm gonna shout, Like the battle is over I′m gonna sing, Like the storm has passed I'll raise my hands, In the joy of surrender Cause it′s already done, You've already won In you, I overcome

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I′ve got my feet on the rock And I will not be moved I've got my feet on the rock And I've got nothing to prove I am yours, and you are mine You are with me in this fight IN YOU I OVERCOME

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I′ve got my feet on the rock And I will not be moved I′ve got my feet on the rock And I've got nothing to prove I am yours, and you are mine You are with me in this fight

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I′ve got my feet on the rock And I will not be moved I've got my feet on the rock And I′ve got nothing to prove I am yours, and you are mine You are with me in this fight

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: IN YOU I OVERCOME IN YOU I OVERCOME

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I'm gonna shout, Like the battle is over I′m gonna sing, Like the storm has passed I'm gonna shout, Like the battle is over I'm gonna sing, Like the storm has passed I′ll raise my hands In the Joy of surrender Cause it′s already done You've already won

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: It′s already done You've already won

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: In you, I overcome In you, I overcome
